title: Trump's super PAC has $400M. How will he spend it?
shortDescription: Donald Trump's super PAC is sitting on as much money as six major Republican and Democratic campaign committees combined.

title: Troy Jackson expected to join Maine Senate race
shortDescription: As Graham Platner bows out, all eyes turn to Troy Jackson, a seasoned Maine politician preparing for a Senate bid.

title: Why is Trump putting tariffs on Canada? It isn't due to wildfires yet
shortDescription: President Donald Trump signed an executive order to impose new 50% tariffs on some Canadian goods. He is still considering tariffs for the wildfires.

title: Trump says new Air Force One sent for security upgrades
shortDescription: Trump says the new Air Force One gifted by Qatar will be sent out for upgrades for about a month to solve any security and defense concerns.

title: Trump height debate flares after FIFA clip
shortDescription: A FIFA clip, shared by the White House's Rapid Response account on X shows Rodri appearing taller than Trump although both are listed at 6'3."

title: Trump meets with Lebanese president as Iran war escalates. Live.
shortDescription: Amid rising tensions with Iran, Trump said he ordered the Pentagon to retaliate forcefully to any killings of U.S. troops by Iran.

title: Some Trump voters are unhappy. Will they stay home on election day? | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Some Trump voters are growing frustrated over food costs and health care. Could that dissatisfaction hurt Republicans in the midterms?

title: An Arizona race's big stakes for how votes are counted
shortDescription: Voting rights advocates closely watch Arizona's race for secretary of state, as lead candidate supports Trump's rejection of 2020 election results.

title: Why does Trump look shorter than Spain's Rodri?
shortDescription: A viral World Cup final video showing Trump beside Spain star Rodri has reignited questions about the president's reported height.

title: Darline Graham joins South Carolina Senate race
shortDescription: Sen. Darline Graham is launching a bid for her brother’s former South Carolina Senate seat after Trump endorsed her.

title: Latest White House sculpture may go to Trump library
shortDescription: Unlike the other statues, which are all on loan to the People’s House, the new sculpture was a gift made by George Lundeen.

title: Trump hits Canada with new 50% tariffs
shortDescription: President Trump imposed new 50% tariffs on many Canadian imports on everything from wine to hockey sticks to cement.

title: US military death toll rises to 17 as Iran war intensifies
shortDescription: As the United States launched strikes against Iran for the tenth consecutive day, the death toll of American service members rose to 17.

title: Trump hits Canada with new 50% tariffs
shortDescription: President Trump took executive action to impose 50% tariffs on a wide range of imports from Canada.

title: Trump moves to limit student, journalist visas
shortDescription: Foreign students and journalists face new visa limits under a Trump administration rule set to take effect in September.

title: Unhappy Trump voters may stay home in the midterms
shortDescription: Frustrated Trump voters may not back Democrats, but lower turnout could still threaten Republican majorities in the midterms.

title: Troy Jackson likely to become U.S. Senate Democratic nominee in Maine
shortDescription: Troy Jackson looks all but certain to replace Graham Platner as the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate after a dominate weekend performance.

title: Mamdani calls AOC an ‘inspiration’ amid 2028 White House buzz
shortDescription: he congresswoman has caused speculation in recent months over whether or not she's interested in higher office. Here's what Mamdani said of AOC.

title: Trump updates from weekend include Barron, World Cup trophy ceremony
shortDescription: President Trump attended the World Cup final Sunday, and son Barron Trump was there. Iran war kills more troops. Air Force One will get some updates.

title: Trump presses Canadian on wildfires
shortDescription: President Donald Trump says Canadian wildfires have poisoned U.S. air, pressing Canadian officials to get the over 900 fires under control.
